mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mobile_auth_tokens ( id, user_id, device_id, access_jti, refresh_token, expires_at, revoked_at, created_at, last_used_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{accessJti}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiresAt}, #{revokedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{lastUsedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, device_id, access_jti, refresh_token, expires_at, revoked_at, created_at, last_used_at FROM mobile_auth_tokens WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND revoked_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, device_id, access_jti, refresh_token, expires_at, revoked_at, created_at, last_used_at FROM mobile_auth_tokens WHERE access_jti = #{accessJti} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE mobile_auth_tokens SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND revoked_at IS NULL
